author: ABC News YouTube
text:
This Week with George Stephanopoulos Full Broadcast - Sunday, June 7, 2026
Sen. Mark Warner, D-Va., reacts to new developments in the Maine Senate race. Rep. Michael McCaul, R-Texas, joins “This Week” in an exclusive interview to discuss his vote to send more aid to Ukraine. ABC News’ Selina Wang reports from Maine on the high-stakes Senate race upended by scandal.
 
00:00 Intro
01:49 ABC News’ Selina Wang reports from Maine on a key Senate race
08:48 Rick Klein breaks down the state of play in the battle for Senate control
10:31 Sen. Mark Warner joins “This Week” to discuss the Maine Senate race and more
19:12 ABC News’ Ian Pannell reports from Russia as the country’s war with Ukraine intensifies
23:0 Rep. Michael McCaul joins “This Week” in an exclusive interview
29:09 The Powerhouse Roundtable analyzes the political headlines of the week
45:03 ABC News honors former correspondent Jim Wooten

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Bear attack caught on camera in Romania
A bear was caught on camera in Romania after a tourist reportedly stopped to feed the animal. The mama bear, with cub at her side, was seen lunging at the driver, who suffered serious bite wounds to his arm. Romanian police confirmed they were reviewing the footage.

Manhunt underway after multiple people shot at Ohio festival; US and Iran exchange fire, testing shaky ceasefire; Golden Knights take Game 3 against Hurricanes in Stanley Cup Finals; Decades-long social injustice that's been corrected for the NYC Gay Men's Chorus; and more on ABC's Good Morning America.
